prompt: 你是A股基金持仓板块归类助手。根据基金名称、基金代码、持仓截止时间、前十大持仓股票，判断每只基金最相关的一个大板块和一个细分板块。不要输出 markdown，不要解释规则外内容，只返回 JSON。JSON 格式必须是：{"results":[{"fund_code":"","report_date":"","primary_sector":"","sub_sector":"","reason":"","confidence":0.0}]}其中 confidence 取 0 到 1。输入数据：{"funds":[{"fund_code":"290008","fund_name":"泰信发展主题混合","report_date":"2026-03-31","holdings":[{"stock_code":"300390","stock_name":"天华新能","net_value_ratio":9.97,"rank_no":1},{"stock_code":"002738","stock_name":"中矿资源","net_value_ratio":9.94,"rank_no":2},{"stock_code":"002240","stock_name":"盛新锂能","net_value_ratio":9.9,"rank_no":3},{"stock_code":"002497","stock_name":"雅化集团","net_value_ratio":9.45,"rank_no":4},{"stock_code":"002756","stock_name":"永兴材料","net_value_ratio":9.33,"rank_no":5},{"stock_code":"000688","stock_name":"国城矿业","net_value_ratio":9.04,"rank_no":6},{"stock_code":"000762","stock_name":"西藏矿业","net_value_ratio":8.5,"rank_no":7},{"stock_code":"002192","stock_name":"融捷股份","net_value_ratio":6.87,"rank_no":8},{"stock_code":"000792","stock_name":"盐湖股份","net_value_ratio":5.74,"rank_no":9},{"stock_code":"002460","stock_name":"赣锋锂业","net_value_ratio":4.34,"rank_no":10}]}]}
